# ASImportableCredential.Note

**Structure**

A piece of text used to store some information about an item.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Note
```

## Creating a note

- **init(content:)**: Creates a note instance from the note contents.

## Accessing note properties

- **content**: The contents of the note.

## Document credential types

- **ASImportableCredential.note(_:)**: A note credential.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
